case_title: KZ TILE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,375.00 FILED BY KZ TILE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KZ TILE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 INTEREST, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,116.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-22-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS CASE
